title: Arrays, Dynamic Sequences, and Locality
description: Design an event buffer with predictable indexing, insertion, and memory behavior. Learners cumulatively produce an array-backed sequence with operation traces through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Explain indexing and cache-local traversal from contiguous logical storage.
Trace capacity growth and amortized append behavior through resize events.
Compare indexed access, search, middle insertion, deletion, slicing, and copying costs.
